name: page-agent
description: Control browser pages, click elements, fill forms, and automate web interactions through the Page Agent Chrome extension
author: Page Agent Team
examples: Navigate to github.com and login with username and password
Fill out a contact form on the current page
Click the submit button on a web form
Scroll down on a webpage to load more content
Get information about the current page

page-agent.description: Main tool for browser automation through Page Agent extension

url.description: URL to navigate to (for navigate action)

selector.description: CSS selector of the element to interact with

value.description: Value to select in a dropdown

key.description: Keyboard key to press (e.g., Enter, Escape, Tab)

delay.description: Delay in milliseconds between keystrokes (for type action)
